## Security / Secrets / Privacy

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private keys, or sensitive data were added.
- [ ] Logs and examples were checked for credential leakage.
- [ ] New inputs or outputs were reviewed for trust-boundary impact.

## Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover the behavior that changed.
- [ ] Error paths and operator-visible failures are clear.
- [ ] Compatibility impact is documented or explicitly absent.
- [ ] Rollback is realistic for the touched component.
